judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but high valuation multiples and thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.3%; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Earnings growth 104.0% YoY — significant profit expansion.
Free cash flow $936.73M — healthy cash generation.
Consensus is strong buy with a high mean target of $223.02.
negatives: Operating margin 0.8% — thin profitability despite high gross margins.
Return on equity 3.9% and Return on assets -0.2% — weak returns on capital.

news.paragraph: Wedbush reiterated its bullish stance on Datadog with a price target of $48 and an Outperform rating, indicating continued analyst confidence in the company's prospects. While the specific catalyst is a rating reaffirmation, traders should note the high target price suggests significant upside potential according to at least one major analyst. The upcoming earnings report in August will be a key event to watch for confirmation of this optimistic outlook.

headlines.title: Wedbush Remains Bullish On Dynatrace (DT) With $48 PT And Outperform Rating
